summary.key_theme: 市場對 Southern Company 的政策風險擔憂減弱，且受惠於再生能源項目擴展與基礎設施投資，分析師維持正面評級。

bullish.title: Southern Company Risk Looks Overdone as Policy Fears Fade
bullish.reason: Mizuho 分析師認為市場對 Southern Company 的政策風險過度反應，維持 Outperform 評級，顯示機構投資人對其基本面信心回升。

bullish.title: Taking A Fresh Look At Southern (SO) Valuation After Georgia Power’s Largest Distributed Solar Commitment
bullish.reason: Georgia Power 獲得監管批准進行大規模分散式太陽能電力採購，有助於提升公司綠能組合佔比並符合長期 ESG 發展目標。

bullish.title: Southern Linc And Virginia Natural Gas Projects Add Context To Southern Stock
bullish.reason: 透過 Southern Linc 與 Virginia Natural Gas 的項目進展，顯示公司在通訊與天然氣基礎設施領域的多元化佈局，為股價提供穩定支撐。

neutral.title: Southern Company first-quarter 2026 earnings to be released April 30
neutral.reason: 僅為例行性的財報發布日期公告，屬於市場預期內的資訊，對股價無直接影響。
